given: a stock record at a location in the SKU detail view has NULL batch_number or NULL serial_number
when: the SKU detail page is rendered
architectural_notes: E2E: the null-tolerant presentation rule applied to the SKU detail view. Rendering 'not tracked' for a NULL batch_number/serial_number at a location is a display concern owned by the boundary + detail template, not the domain. Same boundary -> service -> repository -> models read path as AC3; the 'not tracked' substitution is consistent with the home-table rule (AC2) and carries no business logic into the service or model.

independence.rationale: AC3 tests field presence with populated data; AC4 tests the observable rendering behavior when detail-view data is NULL, a distinct outcome independent of the column/field existence
